title: Vocal Trace Toddler Speech App Landing Page

requirements.text: Implement a global design system using Primary Navy Blue (#1A365D), Accent Teal Green (#2DADA3), and Soft Cream (#FEF9F3) as the background. Apply a heavy sans-serif font (e.g., 'Nunito' or 'Poppins' via Google Fonts) for all headings. All containers must use border-radius: 32px. No sharp corners anywhere on the page.

quotes: Color Palette: Primary Navy Blue (#1A365D), Accent Teal Green (#2DADA3), and Soft Cream Backgrounds (#FEF9F3)
Avoid sharp corners; use border-radius: 32px on all containers
Use heavy, sans-serif fonts for headings

acceptanceCriteria: All backgrounds default to #FEF9F3 cream
Primary headings render in #1A365D navy
Accent elements use #2DADA3 teal
border-radius: 32px is applied to all card and container elements
Headings use a heavy weight (700–900) sans-serif font loaded from Google Fonts

requirements.text: Create all Teal CTA buttons as 3D 'Magic Jelly' style: glossy background (#2DADA3), heavy inner-glow (inset box-shadow with a lighter teal), a subtle drop shadow beneath, border-radius: 32px, and a slight scale-down transform on :active to simulate a squish press. These buttons must look like 3D gummy candy.

quotes: Buttons should look like 3D 'Magic Jelly' (glossy, rounded, and tactile)
apply a heavy inner-glow and a subtle drop shadow to the Teal buttons to make them look like 3D gummy candy

acceptanceCriteria: Teal buttons have a visible gloss/shine effect using CSS gradients or pseudo-elements
A heavy inset box-shadow creates an inner glow effect
A drop shadow is visible beneath each button
Pressing (active state) scales the button down slightly (e.g., scale(0.96))
All teal buttons share this consistent style via a reusable component or CSS class

requirements.text: Build a sticky top navigation bar with the Vocal Trace logo (navy text 'Vocal Trace' with a teal checkmark-rocket icon rendered as SVG) on the left, navigation links in the center, and a small Magic Jelly 'Get Started' button on the right. The navbar background should be cream (#FEF9F3) with a subtle shadow on scroll.

quotes: Logo Theme: Use the provided Vocal Trace logo (Navy blue text with a Teal Green 'Checkmark-Rocket' icon)

acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is sticky and remains visible on scroll
Logo SVG is visible with teal rocket-checkmark icon and navy 'Vocal Trace' text
Navigation links are present (e.g., How It Works, Features, Testimonials)
A Magic Jelly CTA button appears in the top right
A shadow appears on the navbar when the user scrolls down

requirements.text: Implement the Hero section with: headline 'Watch Their First Words Take Flight.' in heavy navy type, sub-headline 'The speech-boosting app that turns vocal traces into big milestones. Designed by experts, loved by little explorers.', a giant teal Magic Jelly CTA button labeled 'Start the Journey', and a split-screen illustration — left side showing a happy toddler, right side showing a colorful app UI with a 'Peeking Friend' character peeking from the bottom edge of a rounded screen mockup.

quotes: Headline: 'Watch Their First Words Take Flight.'
Sub-headline: 'The speech-boosting app that turns vocal traces into big milestones.'
CTA: A giant Teal 'Magic Jelly' button labeled 'Start the Journey.'
A playful split-screen showing a happy toddler on one side and the app's 'Peeking Friend' UI on the other

acceptanceCriteria: Headline text matches exactly: 'Watch Their First Words Take Flight.'
Sub-headline text matches exactly
A large teal Magic Jelly button labeled 'Start the Journey' is prominently displayed
A split-screen visual is present showing toddler illustration and app UI mockup
The Peeking Friend character peeks from the bottom of the app mockup panel
The hero section fills the viewport on desktop

requirements.text: Add a Social Proof Bar below the hero: a clean horizontal row displaying three grayscale trust badges/logos for 'Parent's Choice Award', 'Speech Pathology Approved', and 'STEM Kids 2026'. Use small illustrated badge icons in grayscale with the label text below each. Separate them with subtle dividers.

quotes: Add a clean row of grayscale logos for 'Parent's Choice Award,' 'Speech Pathology Approved,' and 'STEM Kids 2026.'

acceptanceCriteria: Three trust badges are displayed in a single horizontal row
All badge icons and text are rendered in grayscale
Badge labels match: 'Parent's Choice Award', 'Speech Pathology Approved', 'STEM Kids 2026'
The bar sits between the hero and the How It Works section

requirements.text: Build the 'How It Works' section with a bold section heading, three equal columns each with a large rounded icon container (teal background), a step number, a bold title, and descriptive copy. Step 1: 'Listen' – 'Vocal Trace captures your child's unique vocalizations.' Step 2: 'Interact' – 'Our Magic Jelly UI responds to every sound with delightful haptic feedback.' Step 3: 'Grow' – 'Expert-backed pathways bridge the gap between babbling and words.'

quotes: Use three columns with rounded icons.
Step 1: Listen.
Step 2: Interact.
Step 3: Grow.

acceptanceCriteria: Section has a bold heading (e.g., 'How It Works')
Three columns are displayed side by side on desktop, stacked on mobile
Each column has a rounded icon container with teal background
Step titles and descriptions match the specified copy exactly
Step numbers (1, 2, 3) are visually prominent

requirements.text: Implement the Feature Showcase with an alternating left-right layout for two features. Feature A: 'Tactile Feedback' — 'Magic Jelly buttons that squish when touched to teach cause-and-effect.' Feature B: 'Safe Exploration' — '100% Ad-free, kid-safe environment with parental gates.' Each feature row should have an illustration/mockup on one side and bold headline + copy on the other, inside a rounded (32px) cream or light-teal card.

quotes: Feature A: 'Tactile Feedback.'
Feature B: 'Safe Exploration.'
Alternating Layout

acceptanceCriteria: Two feature rows are displayed with alternating image/text orientation
Feature A copy references Magic Jelly squish and cause-and-effect
Feature B copy references 100% Ad-free, kid-safe, and parental gates
Each row is wrapped in a rounded container (border-radius: 32px)
Layout reverses cleanly on desktop (image-left / image-right alternation)

requirements.text: Build a Testimonial Section with a large soft navy/teal-tinted rounded card (border-radius: 32px) containing a parent quote about their child's speech progress, the parent's name and child's age, and large decorative quotation mark. Use a sample testimonial: '"Vocal Trace helped our daughter say her first real word in just three weeks. We cried happy tears!" — Sarah M., Mom of Lily, age 2.'

quotes: A large, soft-blue rounded card featuring a quote from a parent about their child's progress.

acceptanceCriteria: A large rounded card (32px radius) is displayed centered on the page
The card contains a parent testimonial quote, name, and child's age
A large decorative quotation mark is visible
The card uses a soft teal or navy-tinted background to distinguish it from the cream page background

requirements.text: Add a Footer CTA section with a bold headline encouraging parents to get started, a teal Magic Jelly button labeled 'Unlock Their Voice Today', and a brief supporting tagline. Below it, include a minimal footer with the Vocal Trace logo, copyright notice, and links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

quotes: Reiterate the Teal 'Magic Jelly' button with the text 'Unlock Their Voice Today.'

acceptanceCriteria: A prominent section above the footer contains a bold headline and the 'Unlock Their Voice Today' Magic Jelly button
The footer includes the Vocal Trace logo, copyright line, and Privacy/Terms links
The CTA button matches the Magic Jelly style defined in REQ-2

requirements.text: Implement a scrolling dot-trail motif connecting all page sections. As the user scrolls, a series of small teal dots (inspired by the Vocal Trace logo motif) forms a decorative vertical path along the left or center of the page, creating a visual 'trace' or journey between sections. Use CSS animation or an SVG path with scroll-driven opacity/position to bring it to life.

quotes: Ensure the 'Vocal Trace' dot motif (from the logo) is used as a decorative 'path' or 'trail' that connects the sections as the user scrolls.

acceptanceCriteria: Teal dots are visible as a decorative trail between sections
The trail animates or reveals progressively as the user scrolls down
Dots are styled to match the teal brand color (#2DADA3)
The motif does not obstruct readable content and remains decorative

constraints: All user-facing copy must match the exact wording specified in the requirements
Color palette must strictly use #1A365D, #2DADA3, and #FEF9F3 — no substitutions
All containers and buttons must use border-radius: 32px minimum — no sharp corners
No backend logic is required; this is a purely static frontend landing page
Do not use blue or purple as primary accent colors — teal (#2DADA3) is the sole accent
nonGoals: App store integration or actual app download flow
Backend data storage or user tracking
Real audio or speech processing features

required: Cheerful cartoon toddler sitting and smiling, warm and playful illustration style on a soft cream background (hero-toddler.dim_600x700.png)
Colorful rounded smartphone mockup showing a playful kids app UI with a cute cartoon animal character peeking from the bottom edge, teal and navy colors (hero-app-mockup.dim_600x700.png)
Circular badge icon with a ribbon and star for 'Parent's Choice Award', grayscale flat illustration (badge-parents-choice.dim_120x120.png)
Circular badge icon with a speech bubble and checkmark for 'Speech Pathology Approved', grayscale flat illustration (badge-speech-pathology.dim_120x120.png)
Circular badge icon with a rocket and star for 'STEM Kids 2026', grayscale flat illustration (badge-stem-kids.dim_120x120.png)
Rounded tablet screen mockup showing colorful jelly-style buttons being pressed, teal glow effects (feature-tactile.dim_560x420.png)
Illustration of a friendly parental gate shield with a padlock and child-safe checkmark icon, teal and navy palette (feature-safe.dim_560x420.png)
Teal checkmark merged with a small rocket launching upward, clean vector icon style on transparent background, used as the Vocal Trace logo mark (logo-icon.dim_80x80.png)
